Notes: Execution workspace shows governed machine selection context and disables updates when assignment is fixed by the job card.
Execution workspace shows governed operator selection context and disables updates when assignment is fixed by the job card.
Good production quantity is decimal-governed for live quantity posting.
Reject quantity is captured through governed quantity posting instead of a dead Add reject action.
Scrap quantity is captured through governed quantity posting.
Reason codes use governed selector values.
Pause requires governed reason before the live pause action is enabled.
Remarks remain optional narrative text, not a governed master-linked or numeric field.
Date filter controls remain non-text date controls.
No touched governed material field remains unrestricted text.
No touched governed return field remains unrestricted text.
